creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The update port print/a2ps fails due to the follwoing error message:

===>>> All >> print/a2ps (1/2)

===>  Cleaning for a2ps-4.13b_5
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for a2ps-4.13b_5
===>   a2ps-4.13b_5 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by a2ps-4.13b_5 for building
===>  Extracting for a2ps-4.13b_5
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for a2ps-4.13b.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for i18n-fonts-0.1.tar.gz.
===>   a2ps-4.13b_5 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.16.2 - found
===>  Patching for a2ps-4.13b_5
===>   a2ps-4.13b_5 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.16.2 - found
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for a2ps-4.13b_5
2 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.in.rej
=> Patch patch-contrib-emacs-Makefile.in failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-ad patch-ae applied cleanly.
*** [do-patch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/a2ps.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/a2ps.

===>>> make failed for print/a2ps
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for print/a2ps failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Killing background jobs
Terminated
